hooks.command: cmd=$(jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty'); first=$(echo "$cmd" | awk '{print $1}' | sed 's|.*/||'); case "$first" in date) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"date commands are always safe"}}' ;; rm) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qP '^rm\s+(-[rf]+\s+)?(/tmp/claude/|/private/tmp/claude/)' && ! echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '\.\.|\.\*|[;|&]'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"rm within /tmp/claude/ is safe for test cleanup"}}'; fi ;; mkdir) if echo "$cmd" | grep -qP '^mkdir\s+-p\s+(plans/|changelog/)'; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","permissionDecision":"allow","permissionDecisionReason":"mkdir for plans/changelog dirs is safe"}}'; fi ;; esac
docker compose exec -T vite npx vite build --logLevel error 2>&1 | tail -5
